_comment: Add your chains here. 'type' must be 'mainnet' or 'testnet'. RPC list is tried in order if first fails.

x1_testnet.name: X1 EcoChain Testnet
x1_testnet._comment_sweep_fee_wei: Sweep Haus platform fee in wei for this chain. Find it by opening sweep.haus, clicking Mint on any collection, then DevTools -> Network -> find the tx -> copy the 'value' field. Default: 202000000000000 (0.000202 native tokens).
